Book Appointment

Pricing

The pricing at Artisan Clinic has been designed with transparency and our patients' comfort in mind. We have carefully selected the range of services and their pricing to match the highest quality procedures and individual needs. We believe that access to professional medical and aesthetic care should be clear and understandable from the very first contact - that is why we value honesty, communication and transparency.

Argo Plasma

Skin tightening – Argo Plasma

6 000 PLN/area

Every price includes appropriate anaesthesia for the procedure – local or general. Changing to general anaesthesia at the patient's request costs 3 500 PLN.
For procedures involving more than one area, the price is determined individually.
